arts.ttl: How Cameron Carter-Vickers really feels about Celtic amid Bayer Leverkusen rumours
arts.sum: However, with the January transfer window now open, the rumours of interest in Cameron Carter-Vickers have resurfaced but it seems Celtic fans need not worry about those after an update was dropped on how the big American feels about life at Parkhead and in Scotland. Anthony Joseph shares how Cameron Carter-Vickers fells at Celtic as Bayer Leverkusen rumours swirl

arts.ttl: Rangers vs Celtic – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Rangers take on Old Firm rivals Celtic in the Scottish Premiership on Thursday looking for revenge. Philippe Clement’s side lost a thrilling League Cup final to their bitter rivals last month and are a distant second in the Scottish Premiership. The cup decider ended 3-3 before Celtic triumphed via a penalty shootout. It extended a […] The post Rangers vs Celtic – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Gabby Agbonlahor and Alan Brazil discuss Celtic's trip to Rangers, with 'neutral fans' warning
arts.sum: Ahead of Celtic’s trip to Ibrox on Thursday, Gabby Agbonlahor and Alan Brazil discussed the game. But he did warn that Celtic’s dominance in the Glasgow derby is probably resulting in the neutral fan turning away because it’s one-sided every time.

arts.ttl: Celtic XI vs Rangers – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Celtic will look to take another huge step towards defending the Scottish Premiership when the champions clash with Old Firm rivals Rangers at Ibrox. Brendan Rodgers’ side are runaway leaders in the title race and will extend their advantage to 17 points with a win over their fierce rivals on Thursday. arts.ttl: Tierney tells Celtic terms amid possible return - gossip
arts.sum: More speculation surrounds Kieran Tierney's possible return to Celtic as Scottish clubs get busy in the transfer market.

arts.ttl: Callum McGregor explains how Celtic are going to 'exploit' Rangers at Ibrox
arts.sum: “So, we’ll look at the game and see where we can be better, see where we can maybe exploit that sort of mid-pitch block from Rangers and see the combinations that we need to get through that bit of the pitch and try and cause some problems. McGregor told STV, “Generally, the way that we want to play is the same every week and just adding layers all the time.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers must start ever-growing Celtic player for the first time against Rangers
arts.sum: Celtic should start Alex Valle instead of Greg Taylor for Rangers clash But Alex Valle has looked far better than the Scotland international, especially on the ball, following his season-long loan deal from Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd states what will happen inside Ibrox with Rangers fans if Celtic score first
arts.sum: Kris Boyd says Rangers fans will turn ‘nasty’ inside Ibrox if Celtic score first The former striker even stated that if Celtic score first, then Ibrox will turn ‘nasty’ because there are already a lot of ‘angry’ Rangers fans, as he told Sky Sports News (01/01/25 at 10:20 am).
